title: Readmigo: AI Reading Companion
shortDescription: AI-powered English learning through immersive reading experiences
fullDescription:
Readmigo is your AI-powered reading companion that transforms how you learn English through immersive reading experiences.

SMART READING
Read classic literature and popular books with intelligent AI assistance. Tap any word or sentence to get instant explanations, translations, and context - all powered by advanced AI technology.

PERSONALIZED LEARNING
- Build your vocabulary with smart word saving
- Track your reading progress across multiple books
- Review highlighted passages and notes anytime
- Get AI-powered explanations for difficult passages

RICH BOOK LIBRARY
Explore our curated collection of classic English literature, including works by Jane Austen, Charles Dickens, Mark Twain, and more. New titles added regularly.

READING ENHANCEMENT
- Character Map: Keep track of characters and their relationships
- Story Timeline: Follow the plot with event timelines
- Highlights & Notes: Save important passages
- Reading Statistics: Track your reading habits

BEAUTIFUL READING EXPERIENCE
- Multiple reading themes (light, dark, sepia)
- Adjustable font sizes and styles
- Smooth page navigation
- Offline reading support

SUBSCRIPTION OPTIONS
- Free tier with limited AI interactions
- Pro subscription for unlimited AI features
- Premium subscription for advanced features

Start your English learning journey with Readmigo today. Read more, learn more, grow more.

Website: https://readmigo.app
Privacy Policy: https://readmigo.app/privacy
Terms of Service: https://readmigo.app/terms
